dashboard.label: PhishIQPlus - Cache
dashboard.description: Cache hit visibility for PhishIQPlus enrichment.

search.query: index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=15m sum(cache_hits) as cache_hits sum(urls_total) as urls_total | eval hit_rate=case(urls_total>0, round((cache_hits/urls_total)*100,2), true(), 0) | fields _time cache_hits hit_rate

panel.title: Top stanzas by cache hit rate

search.query: index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | stats sum(cache_hits) as cache_hits sum(urls_total) as urls_total by stanza | eval hit_rate=case(urls_total>0, round((cache_hits/urls_total)*100,2), true(), 0) | sort - hit_rate
